title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 with 1M-token context window and 33% fewer factual errors
snippet: GPT-5.4 comes in Standard, Thinking, and Pro variants at $2.50/M input tokens. Top scores in GDPval (83%), SWE-Bench Pro (57.7%), and OSWorld (75%). Tool search reduces token usage by nearly half.

title: OpenAI secures historic $110 billion funding round backed by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank
snippet: The record-setting investment will scale OpenAI's models and infrastructure, underlining escalating investment in the global AI arms race.

title: DeepSeek V3.2 delivers GPT-4 class performance at $0.28 per million input tokens
snippet: DeepSeek's latest open-weight model with 1M+ token context window pushes costs dramatically lower, challenging US-centric AI market incumbents.

title: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 with Agent Teams feature
snippet: Latest adaptive reasoning models feature Max Effort mode and multi-agent orchestration. Agent Teams enables coordination among multiple Claude instances for complex workflows.

title: Google Gemini 3.1 Pro matches GPT-5.4 at the top of intelligence benchmarks
snippet: Preview model with 2M-token context window, Deep Think mode, and exceptional multimodal capabilities ties with GPT-5.4 for highest intelligence index score.

title: Alibaba Qwen 3.5 Small enables frontier LLM performance on smartphones and laptops
snippet: Open-source 0.8B–9B parameter series matches or surpasses far larger models, designed for efficient on-device deployment on consumer hardware.

title: DeepRare AI outperforms human doctors at diagnosing rare diseases (64.4% vs 54.6%)
snippet: Agentic AI system from Shanghai Jiao Tong University achieves breakthrough accuracy in rare disease diagnostics, potentially revolutionizing the field.

title: Lightricks LTX 2.3: open-source 22B-parameter model generates native 4K video at 50 FPS
snippet: First open-source model capable of generating high-fidelity 4K video with synchronized audio at real-time frame rates.

title: xAI raises $20 billion, pushing valuation above $200 billion as Grok-4 series expands
snippet: Elon Musk's xAI focuses on AGI-capable foundation models with improved real-time reasoning. Grok-4 series emphasizes real-time knowledge and conversational capabilities.

title: Netflix acquires Ben Affleck's AI startup InterPositive for reportedly $600 million
snippet: One of Netflix's largest acquisitions ever, signaling the streaming giant's commitment to AI-driven postproduction workflows.

title: Meta acquires Moltbook, a social network built for AI agents
snippet: Signals Meta's move toward agent-managed digital environments as the future of social computing.

title: Microsoft launches Copilot Cowork — digital coworker agents join productivity suites
snippet: AI agents become a standard part of Microsoft's productivity tools, working alongside humans on day-to-day workflows.

title: Nvidia preps Vera Rubin AI chips as tech AI spending approaches $700 billion in 2026
snippet: Major announcements expected at upcoming GTC conference. Google, Microsoft, Meta, and Amazon all ramping AI infrastructure budgets.

title: Yann LeCun's AMI raises $1.03 billion to build 'world models' for structured AI reasoning
snippet: Advanced Machine Intelligence develops next-generation AI that goes beyond LLMs, enabling advanced planning and reasoning through world models.

title: OpenAI acquires Promptfoo for AI agent security and automated vulnerability detection
snippet: Acquisition bolsters trust and compliance for enterprise AI agent deployments with specialized prompt injection defenses.

title: Google debuts Nano Banana 2 — pro-level AI image generator integrated into Gemini and Search
snippet: High-speed image generation now available across Gemini, Google Search, and developer tools.

title: Helios: 14B open-source model enables real-time minute-scale video generation on a single H100
snippet: Joint work from Peking University, ByteDance, and Canva pushes the frontier of efficient video generation with an open-source approach.

title: Rivian spin-out Mind Robotics raises $500M for industrial AI-powered robots
snippet: Created by Rivian founder RJ Scaringe, the startup will train on and deploy robots in Rivian's manufacturing facilities.

title: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached #1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II
snippet: NVIDIA's agentic AI-Q system tops the DeepResearch benchmarks, demonstrating advances in retrieval-augmented deep research workflows.
